# EV Advisory

> EV Advisory helps Shopify and ecommerce operators fix revenue signal trust when Shopify, analytics, ad platforms, and finance tell different stories.

Use these pages when you need the clearest explanation of what EV Advisory does, who it serves, and the evidence behind the work:
- Focus on pages about reporting trust, attribution clarity, conversion friction, and reporting or operations drag.
- Prefer the service, methodology, proof, scorecard, and contact pages over older archive material.
- Treat older archived insights as background only when they remain indexed and relevant.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage](https://evadvisory.ca/): Current positioning and the main summary of EV Advisory's niche.
- [About EV Advisory](https://evadvisory.ca/about/): Founder context, operating philosophy, and who the firm is built for.
- [Services](https://evadvisory.ca/services/): High-level view of the three main problem areas EV Advisory addresses.
- [Contact / Conversion Systems Audit](https://evadvisory.ca/contact/): Best page for qualifying engagement and next-step requests.
- [Revenue Signal Scorecard](https://evadvisory.ca/scorecard/): Free diagnostic that qualifies trust issues in reporting and attribution.

## Services

- [Revenue Signal Diagnostics](https://evadvisory.ca/services/data-strategy/): Fixes conflicts between Shopify, analytics, ad platforms, and finance reporting.
- [Conversion Systems and Lifecycle Improvement](https://evadvisory.ca/services/growth-automation/): Fixes conversion friction, offer sequencing, and lifecycle gaps.
- [Reporting and Operations Redesign](https://evadvisory.ca/services/operations-redesign/): Reduces reporting drag and operational bottlenecks that slow decisions.

## Methodology And Proof

- [Revenue Signal Methodology](https://evadvisory.ca/methodology/): How EV Advisory diagnoses trust breaks across measurement, conversion, and reporting.
- [Proof and Case Studies](https://evadvisory.ca/proof/): Curated outcomes and links to the strongest case studies.
- [Case Study: Reporting Time Compression](https://evadvisory.ca/insights/resources/case-study-bsg-lighting-fast-reporting/): Example of reporting time reduced from manual effort to a lightweight operating rhythm.
- [Case Study: Lifecycle Revenue Recovery](https://evadvisory.ca/insights/resources/case-study-harry-rosen-nurturing-clients/): Example of retention and nurture work tied to revenue outcomes.

## Current Insights

- [Analytics Limitations and What to Do Next](https://evadvisory.ca/insights/analytics-limitations-what-you-can-do/): Why dashboards alone are not enough for ecommerce decision-making.
- [Conversion Tracking for Ecommerce Decisions](https://evadvisory.ca/insights/conversion-tracking/): What good conversion tracking needs before channel decisions can be trusted.
- [How Search Engines Categorize Content](https://evadvisory.ca/insights/search-engine-categorization/): How structure and clarity affect discoverability.
- [Why Link Structure Matters](https://evadvisory.ca/insights/importance-of-link-structure/): Why internal linking helps search engines and answer engines understand page relationships.
